text:
Cdrecord gave me explanation. I was trying to erase ultra speed cdrw disc,
but my recorder is too slow. I've changed disc to high speed and everything 
orks fine except.. burncd is making endless loop. It's really annoying. Some
info from burncd about inappropriate disc would be nice.
 
Pawe=C5=82
